section_header: APPROACH 1: BENCHMARK, RETUNE, AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text:
## APPROACH 1:
## BENCHMARK, RETUNE, AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple specific targets and actions listed beneath it; serves as umbrella for sub-policies.

section_header: APPROACH 1: BENCHMARK, RETUNE, AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Benchmark 1.3 billion square feet of communitywide buildings by 2026.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text: - Benchmark 1.3 billion square feet in communitywide buildings by 2026
extraction_rationale: Quantified target with deadline under Approach 1.

section_header: APPROACH 1: BENCHMARK, RETUNE, AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Retrofit 167,500 homes by 2030 to reduce energy costs 28%, prioritizing Low- to Moderate-Income (LMI) homes.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Retrofit 167,500 homes to reduce energy costs 28%, prioritizing Low- to Moderate-Income (LMI) homes by 2030
extraction_rationale: Quantified retrofit target, performance outcome (28% cost reduction), equity prioritization, and deadline.

section_header: APPROACH 1: BENCHMARK, RETUNE, AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Adopt a Building Performance Ordinance to ensure benchmarking and retuning of large existing buildings community-wide.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Adopt a Building Performance Ordinance to ensure benchmarking and retuning of large existing buildings community-wide
extraction_rationale: Specific regulatory mechanism ('Adopt...Ordinance') stated as an action under Approach 1.

section_header: APPROACH 1: BENCHMARK, RETUNE, AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Expand weatherization assistance through repairs and upgrades to improve energy efficiency, safety, and comfort in Low to Moderate Income (LMI) housing.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Expand weatherization assistance through repairs and upgrades to improve energy efficiency, safety, and comfort in Low to Moderate Income (LMI) housing
extraction_rationale: Concrete program expansion action targeting energy efficiency in LMI housing.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Create a Quality Assurance Verifier position to support the guidelines and applicability of the Building Performance Ordinance.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Create a Quality Assurance Verifier position to support the guidelines and applicability of Building Performance Ordinance
extraction_rationale: Explicit staffing/resource action to implement an ordinance.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Offer monetary and/or non-monetary incentives to promote building retrofits, starting with LMI buildings.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Offer  monetary  and/or  non-monetary  incentives  to  promote  building  retrofits,  starting  with LMI buildings
extraction_rationale: Specific intervention (incentives) aimed at driving retrofits, with prioritization.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Update Miami-Dade County Government's Electricity Master Plan.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from energy use in buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Update Miami-Dade County Government's Electricity Master Plan
extraction_rationale: Explicit commitment to update a named plan.

section_header: APPROACH 2: EXPAND ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text:
## APPROACH 2:
## EXPAND ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE
## RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple quantified targets/actions listed beneath it.

section_header: APPROACH 2: EXPAND ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Install 61,725 kW of solar energy by 2030 on County buildings, land, and water (equivalent to 7,498 homes' electricity use for one year).
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Install 61,725 kW of solar energy by 2030 on County buildings, land, and water equivalent to 7,498 homes' electricity use for one year
extraction_rationale: Quantified capacity target with deadline and specified siting (County buildings/land/water).

section_header: APPROACH 2: EXPAND ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Install 794,000 kW of solar energy by 2030 on commercial and residential buildings (equivalent to 104,014 homes' electricity use for one year).
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Install  794,000  kW  of  solar  energy  by  2030  on  commercial  and  residential  buildings, equivalent to 104,014 homes' electricity use for one year
extraction_rationale: Quantified capacity target with deadline covering commercial/residential buildings.

section_header: APPROACH 2: EXPAND ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Maximize participation in utility-scale renewable energy programs.
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Maximize participation in utility scale renewable energy progra ms
extraction_rationale: Explicit action to increase participation in utility-scale renewables.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Complete installation of solar on County buildings as identified in Solar Feasibility Study Phase 2.
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Complete  the  installation  of  solar  on County  buildings  as  identified  in  the Solar Feasibility Study Phase 2
extraction_rationale: Concrete implementation commitment tied to a named feasibility study phase.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Establish the Solar Energy Loan Fund program and similar financial mechanisms in Miami-Dade County.
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Establish  the  Solar  Energy  Loan  Fund program  and  similar  financial  mechanisms in Miami-Dade County
extraction_rationale: Specific financing mechanism commitment to support solar deployment.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Require new County buildings to be solar ready.
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Require new County buildings to be solar ready for the County to lead by example
extraction_rationale: Specific requirement for new County buildings (policy/standard).

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Cut soft costs for installing on-site solar energy.
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Cut  soft  costs  for  installing  on-site  solar energy
extraction_rationale: Specific action to reduce non-hardware costs to enable deployment.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Execute an agreement with the U.S. Department of Energy's National Renewable Energy Laboratory (NREL) to pursue mutually beneficial projects to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand on-site and off-site renewable energy generation.
verbatim_text: -   Execute  an  agreement with the United States Department of Energy's National Renewable Energy Laboratory to pursue mutually  beneficial  projects  to  reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
extraction_rationale: Specific institutional agreement/action aimed at emissions reductions.

section_header: APPROACH 3: BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings.
verbatim_text:
## APPROACH 3:
## BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Named approach with targets/actions underneath.

section_header: APPROACH 3: BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Reduce energy use of new buildings 20% by 2030 below 2020 levels.
parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings.
verbatim_text: - Reduce energy use of new buildings 20% by 2030 below 2020 levels
extraction_rationale: Quantified efficiency target with baseline year and deadline.

section_header: APPROACH 3: BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Ensure all new County buildings will be Ultra-Low Energy by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings.
verbatim_text: - All new County buildings will be Ultra-Low Energy by 2030
extraction_rationale: Clear commitment with deadline for County buildings standard.

section_header: APPROACH 3: BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Identify steps to transition to a net-zero ready code.
parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings.
verbatim_text: - Identify steps to transition to net-zero ready code
extraction_rationale: Explicit action to move building codes toward net-zero readiness.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Plan for the first Ultra-Low Energy (ULE) or Net Zero Energy (NZE) County building.
parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Plan for the first ULE or NZE County building
extraction_rationale: Specific planning action for a first-of-kind County facility.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Offer monetary and/or non-monetary incentives to promote construction of ULE or NZE buildings.
parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Offer  monetary and/or non-monetary incentives to promote the construction of ULE or NZE buildings
extraction_rationale: Specific incentive-based intervention to drive ULE/NZE construction.

section_header: Miami-Dade County actions:
policy_statement: Assess embodied carbon in new construction and create policies and programs to reduce it.
parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings.
verbatim_text: -   Assess embodied carbon in new construction and create  policies  and  programs  to  reduce  it
extraction_rationale: Explicit commitment to develop policies/programs addressing embodied carbon.

section_header: APPROACH 4: REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
policy_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text:
## APPROACH 4:
## REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple targets/actions listed beneath.

section_header: APPROACH 4: REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
policy_statement: Shift 10% of transportation mode away from single-occupant vehicles by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: - Shift 10% of transportation mode away from single occupant vehicles by 2030
extraction_rationale: Quantified mode-shift target with deadline.

section_header: APPROACH 4: REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
policy_statement: Electrify the County fleet by 2030: 80% of light vehicles and 50% of buses.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: - Electrify the County fleet: 80% of light vehicles and 50% of buses by 2030
extraction_rationale: Quantified electrification targets for County fleet with deadline.

section_header: APPROACH 4: REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
policy_statement: Transition 30% of communitywide vehicles to electric power by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: - Transition 30% of communitywide vehicles to electric power by 2030
extraction_rationale: Quantified community vehicle electrification target with deadline.

section_header: APPROACH 4: REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
policy_statement: Reduce greenhouse gas emissions from Miami International Airport and PortMiami operations by 50% by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: -   Reduce greenhouse gas emissions from Miami International Airport and PortMiami operations by 50% by 2030
extraction_rationale: Quantified emissions-reduction target with a deadline for specific facilities/operations.

section_header: Actions to reduce vehicle and mobile equipment usage:
policy_statement: Design an Alternative Workplace Solutions policy and program for Miami-Dade County to maintain and expand employee telecommuting and explore methods to encourage other large employers to implement telecommuting.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: -   Design  an  Alternative  Workplace  Solutions policy  and  program  for  Miami-Dade  County to  maintain  and  expand  the  number  of employees  who  telecommute  and  explore methods to encourage other large employers to implement telecommuting
extraction_rationale: Specific policy/program design commitment aimed at reducing transport emissions through telecommuting.

section_header: Actions to expand effective low-carbon mobility options:
policy_statement: Implement the Miami-Dade 2045 Bicycle/Pedestrian Master Plan.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: -   Implement the Miami-Dade 2045 Bicycle/Pedestrian Master Plan
extraction_rationale: Explicit implementation action for a named mobility plan.

section_header: Actions to expand effective low-carbon mobility options:
policy_statement: Implement Complete Streets and Vision Zero pedestrian and cyclist safety programs.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: -   Implement Complete Streets and Vision Zero pedestrian and cyclist safety programs
extraction_rationale: Specific program implementations stated as actions.

section_header: Actions to expand effective low-carbon mobility options:
policy_statement: Rapidly deploy premium public transit solutions along SMART Plan corridors to increase ridership and mode shift from single occupancy vehicles.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: -   Rapidly deploy premium public transit solutions along SMART plan corridors to increase ridership and mode shift from single occupancy vehicles
extraction_rationale: Specific intervention tied to SMART Plan corridors aimed at mode shift.

section_header: Actions to Electrify the County Fleet and Equipment:
policy_statement: Complete a light fleet electrification analysis to guide replacement of County-owned fossil-fuel vehicles with battery-electric vehicles.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: -   Complete a light fleet electrification analysis to guide replacement of County-owned fossil-fuel vehicles with battery-electric vehicles (BEVs)
extraction_rationale: Concrete analytical action supporting fleet electrification decisions.

section_header: Actions to Reduce Emissions at PortMiami, Airports & Other Commercial Hubs:
policy_statement: Install Visual Guidance Docking System (VGDS) at airports to reduce aircraft idling.
parent_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption.
verbatim_text: -   Install  Visual  Guidance  Docking System (VGDS) at airports to reduce aircraft idling.
extraction_rationale: Specific technology deployment action to cut emissions from aircraft operations.

section_header: APPROACH 5: EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces.
verbatim_text:
## APPROACH 5:
## EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple targets/actions under it.

section_header: APPROACH 5: EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Increase community-wide tree canopy to 30% coverage by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces.
verbatim_text: -   Expand community-wide tree canopy to 30% coverage by 2030.
extraction_rationale: Quantified canopy target with deadline.

section_header: APPROACH 5: EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Ensure all County facilities within the Urban Development Boundary attain at least 30% average canopy coverage and facilities outside the UDB attain at least 50% average canopy coverage by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces.
verbatim_text: -   Ensure that all County facilities within the UDB (per 2013 delineation) shall attain an average of  at  least  30%  canopy  coverage  and  all  County  facilities  outside  the  Urban  Development Boundary (UDB) shall attain an average of at least 50% canopy coverage by 2030
extraction_rationale: Binding 'shall' language with quantified canopy coverage targets and deadline.

section_header: APPROACH 5: EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Double the total non-wetland acreage of natural habitat in preservation.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces.
verbatim_text: -   Double the total non-wetland acreage of natural habitat in preservation
extraction_rationale: Clear quantified conservation action (doubling preserved non-wetland habitat).

section_header: APPROACH 5: EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Develop a mitigation policy, based on area impacted, to ensure County-approved development results in a net increase to green infrastructure by the development's completion date.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces.
verbatim_text: -   Develop  a  mitigation  policy,  based  on  area  impacted,  to  ensure  that  County-approved development results in a net increase to green infrastructure by the development's completion date
extraction_rationale: Specific policy development commitment with defined intended outcome (net increase in green infrastructure).

section_header: LETTER FROM MAYOR DANIELLA LEVINE CAVA
policy_statement: Implement the Climate Action Strategy (CAS) to cut Miami-Dade communitywide greenhouse gas emissions 50% by 2030 from 2019 levels, with the goal of achieving net zero by 2050.
verbatim_text: Officially launched on Oct. 27, 2021, this plan describes work taking place on multiple fronts to cut MiamiDade's greenhouse gas emissions 50 percent by 2030 from 2019 levels, with the goal of achieving net zero by 2050.
extraction_rationale: Contains quantified emissions-reduction targets with deadlines (50% by 2030; net zero by 2050) tied to an implemented strategy.
